text:
The ``calendar'' file is preprocessed by cpp(1),
        allowing the inclusion of shared files
        such as company holidays or meetings.
        ---
	The ``calendar'' file is preprocessed by cpp(1),
        allowing the inclusion of shared files
        such as lists of company holidays or meetings.

Fix: 

edit, as above
How-To-Repeat: 
	man calendar
